resources.string: Microphone permission is required for voice input
Speech recognition is not available on this device
Tap an option to copy to input, or long-press to send directly.
The agent needs your sudo password to continue. It will not be shown.
The agent needs a secret value (token or password) to continue. It will not be shown.
Keeps connection alive in the background
Alerts for new replies from Hermes
Username and password cannot be empty
Send a message to start a conversation
Queued \u2014 sends when agent is free\u2026
Animate new messages word by word
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This can\'t be undone.
Malformed pairing string — missing host, port, or token
Malformed pairing string — expected URL or Base64-encoded JSON
No columns found for this board.
Type a search term to browse the skill hub
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
Log output from Hermes will appear here.
Tap refresh to load system diagnostics.
Install the psutil extra for CPU / memory / disk metrics.
This will run hermes update and restart the gateway.
This permanently erases the selected built-in memory files. This cannot be undone.
No pooled credentials. Add one above to enable key rotation.
Remove this pooled API key? The agent will no longer rotate through it.
This will overwrite your current Hermes configuration, skills, sessions, and data. This cannot be undone.
Uploads system info + logs to a public paste service and returns links to send the Hermes team. Pastes auto-delete after 6 hours.
Delete the rollback checkpoint shadow store? Existing /rollback points will be lost.
Approve now (grant consent so it fires; otherwise it stays configured but inactive)
Shell hooks run arbitrary commands on this host. Only add scripts you trust. Takes effect on the next gateway/session restart.
No models reported or provider needs authentication.
Previous chat sessions from Hermes will appear here.
Delete sessions older than the specified number of days.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This can\'t be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete %1$d session(s)? This can\'t be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone. All events sent to this URL will be rejected.
Connection profiles from Hermes will appear here.
No description provided. Describe this profile\'s role.
Install a plugin from a git/URL source
Select active memory and context providers
This will remove the "%1$s" plugin from your agent.
No catalog entries match your search.
Scheduled tasks from Hermes will appear here.
e.g. origin, local, all, or telegram:chat_id
You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
This will wipe all unlock and discovery data. Achievements will be re-scanned from scratch on the next scan. This cannot be undone.
Environment keys from Hermes will appear here.
Environment changes take effect after a gateway restart.
Add messaging platforms in Hermes to see them here.
Changes saved. Restart the gateway for them to take effect.
Dashboard unreachable — check IP and port
Paste the pairing string from your Hermes dashboard below.
Configured OAuth providers will appear here. Connect an account to use it from the app.
This provider is managed by an external CLI. Run the command below on the host, then refresh this list.
Authorize in the browser, then paste the authorization code (the part before any # separator) below.
Enter this code at the verification URL on another device, then wait — this screen polls automatically.
Background processes for this session will appear here.
Open a chat session first — the process list is scoped to a session.
Usage stats will appear here once the agent has been active.
No cost recorded in this period.
